comment_raw: The problem is that the link points to nowhere in the Greek World Study Tool, but if spelled correctly (without separation marks) it does give the expected results. I've already pointed out this problem in the past: I think it is absurd to have a link to such an important tool and then get the reply "Sorry, no information was found for φθί-νω."
